title: Prepare for and respond to an external audit of the establishment's quality system
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare for and respond to an external audit of the establishment's quality system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for external audit

pcs.text: Document and schedule known or expected dates of external audits according to workplace practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and schedule known or expected dates of external audits according to workplace practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and schedule known or expected dates of external audits according to workplace practices.

pcs.text: Confirm dates and notify all relevant company personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm dates and notify all relevant company personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm dates and notify all relevant company personnel.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble team who will prepare for external audit and make necessary notifications throughout the workplace.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Convey audit scope to people affected by external audit processes.
